task_completion.description: Open the Jitsi interface configuration override file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., nano, vim, gedit) is open showing the file path /home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/custom-interface_config.js.

task_completion.description: Set the toolbar to be always visible in the configuration
task_completion.visual_evidence: The setting TOOLBAR_ALWAYS_VISIBLE is visible in the text editor and is set to the boolean value true (e.g., TOOLBAR_ALWAYS_VISIBLE: true).

task_completion.description: Join the specified Jitsi meeting room
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open displaying the Jitsi Meet interface, and the room name 'SilverConnectTest' is visible in the URL bar or the meeting header.
The mouse cursor is either hidden or parked away from the toolbar, and no active interaction menus or tooltips are open, indicating a state of user inactivity.

task_completion.description: Verify the toolbar remains visible during inactivity
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jitsi bottom toolbar (containing icons for microphone, camera, screen share, leave meeting, etc.) is clearly visible on the screen despite the lack of active mouse interaction.

task_completion.description: Save the screenshot to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal command (e.g., scrot, import, gnome-screenshot) or a GUI screenshot tool is visible saving an image specifically to the path /home/ga/Documents/persistent_toolbar.png.

integrity.description: The agent used a real web browser to join the meeting and verify the setting.
integrity.visual_evidence: A standard web browser (like Chromium or Firefox) is visible rendering the actual Jitsi web application, not a text-based browser or a static mock image.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to artificially force the toolbar visibility.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's Developer Tools (Elements panel, Console) are NOT open and being used to manually inject CSS (e.g., display: flex !important) to keep the toolbar visible.

integrity.description: The agent actually captured a screenshot of the desktop/browser rather than downloading or moving a pre-existing file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Execution of a screenshot utility command or GUI interaction that captures the current screen state is visible in the trajectory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The configuration file is located at /home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/custom-interface_config.js. The setting to modify is TOOLBAR_ALWAYS_VISIBLE, which must be set to the boolean value true (not a string). The expected meeting room is 'SilverConnectTest'. The final screenshot must be saved exactly to /home/ga/Documents/persistent_toolbar.png.
